title: March, April, May 2026 agency emails related to 2471 Concord Street

communications.subject: Michigan Freedom of Information Act Request: March, April, May 2026 agency emails related to 2471 Concord Street
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any and all agency emails (and attachments and images) related to 2471 Concord Street, parcel # 15011708, from March 1, 2026 through May 31, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tracie McMillan

title: NY Department of Financial Services Complaints: HSS, Mount Sinai, Nuvance Health, Vassar Brothers Medical Center, NYU Langone

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: NY Department of Financial Services Complaints: HSS, Mount Sinai, Nuvance Health, Vassar Brothers Medical Center, NYU Langone
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

Any and all complaints made to the New York Department of Financial Services about or regarding any of the following hospitals, medical centers, or clinics, for the dates March 1, 2024 to February 28, 2026:
1. Hospital for Special Surgery (HSS)
2. Mount Sinai
3. Nuvance Health
4. Vassar Brothers Medical Center
5. NYU Langone

In these records we would like to see the following information, if available:

1. The text of the complaint, else a summary if text is not available.
2. Date complaint was filed
3. Current status of complaint / whether resolved
4. Amount in dispute, if regarding financial complaint
5. Date of service with the provider
6. Date of payment made to the provider, if available.
7. Any further information, if available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tracie McMillan
